card_description: Wilhelm is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick fully embraces a Hindu framework, identifying the world as "Maya" (wizardry/illusion) and his 3-74 experience as the death of the "empirical ego" leading to "enlightenment" (Liberation)."
